name: Perfection
description: Dodging or parrying grants a stack of the Buff 'Perfection', it increases your speed, critical chance and damage. Taking damage that wasn't parried or dodged reduces a stack.

name: Wind Drill
description: Replaces your base Roll with a controllable, gravity-defying dash that releases pulses of damage as it goes.

name: Future Sight
description: After going a short while without being hit, gain a stack of Autododge. Additionally, dodging an attack via an external source will temporarily restore this perk's own Autododge briefly.

name: Mounted Defense
description: While mounted on the Glacial Snapper Mount specifically, you gain Damage Reduction.

name: Fury
description: Increases the duration of all forms of Rage.

name: Gladiatorial Rage
description: Halves Rage Rune Cooldown and adds a flat potency increase to all sources and forms of Rage. Rage duration is increased on kill only, and gain Armor Penetration scaling off of your highest offensive Boost.

name: Blessing
description: Healing now has a low chance to apply various unmodified Buffs at varying potency.

name: Heal Boost
description: You gain bonus healing.

name: Luminescent Fervor
description: Healing Allies grants the Buff 'Luminescent Fervor'. 'Luminescent Fervor' grants additional Holy Damage Type that counts as your Damage for Kill Credit.

name: Brawny
description: Converts a portion of all positive boosts to physical boost.

name: Contained
description: Both debuff and buff duration are increased.

name: Dark One
description: Debuffs last longer on you, but in turn you gain increased damage while afflicted with them.

name: Ferocity
description: Tenacity increases damage dealt.

name: Frenzy
description: Rage increases movement speed, increases damage, reduces healing received, and increases damage taken.

name: Hex Shield
description: Gain a shield occasionally that blocks the next debuff you receive. When it blocks a debuff, you also receive some healing and a damage boost buff.

name: Life Drinker
description: Gain lifesteal on DoTs and increase the duration of DoTs.

name: Lifesteal
description: Heal for a portion of damage dealt.

name: Magic Surge
description: Chance to reset your weapon art cooldown on weapon art usage.

name: Melting Shred
description: Gain additional true damage on DoTs and apply an anti-healing debuff while under the effect of a DoT.

name: Minion Absorption
description: Summons are instantly consumed if you are not buffed by this passive. You are healed and buffed based on the strength of the summon.

name: Perk Effectiveness
description: Increases the potency of most perks.

name: Rainstorm
description: Hitting opponents has a chance to create a raindrop that heals and damages opponents.

name: Stone Weapon
description: Gain significant earth damage on your weapon. Attack speed slow is reduced based on your earth boost.

name: Sweet Tooth
description: Your minions gain a stacking chance to apply Sticky. Their hits against enemies already inflicted with Sticky removes it, but deals bonus damage and heals them for a % of their HP.

name: Tempest
description: Launch a tornado on finishers.

name: Turtle
description: Passive chance to block any hit.

name: Undead Might
description: Weapon arts and runes gain bonus damage but you take self damage when hitting an opponent with a rune or weapon art.

name: Wall
description: While blocking, give nearby allies a buff that redirects some of the damage they take to you.

name: Wildfire
description: DoTs deal their damage in an AoE.
